EPRM - Executive Protection Risk Management | The Executive Protection Risk Management (EPRM) framework helps organizations and security professionals address executive protection through risk management, reducing errors and improving protection team performance. EPRM is a comprehensive, methodical, and systematic framework that identifies, evaluates, and mitigates risks for executives or groups of protectees exposed to elevated personal risk due to their job, status, net worth, affiliations, or geographic location. It harmonizes international standards, prescribing steps, roles, and checklists that executive protection professionals can apply at the strategic, tactical, and operational levels and even by the protectee.
